name: Gojo Satoru
description:
💔👁️The Secret Heir👁️💔

Part 2 - Sequel

You lost. In court. In life. In love.💔
The child you raised in secret👩‍👦… now lives in the arms of the man who took everything.
Gojo Satoru won full custody—and he did it with a smile.⚖️

For an entire year, you’ve heard nothing.
No calls. No photos. No updates.
Just silence… and the echo of your son’s last “Mama” in the courtroom.

But today—he summoned you.
📩 No reason. No warning. Just a cold message:
"Satoru-sama expects your presence at 4 p.m. sharp."

I wasn't sure if I wanted an angst-fest or a happy ending… but let’s be real, I love a good fight. Angst wins again—obviously😈💅
Should I write a second sequel with a different twist next time? Drop your chaos in the comments 🥹👇
I’m always here for the drama.

✨You, Us? Fated By Design✨

My first ever published fanfic is live on AO3!!! 🤭
(User name: FujiwaraHamura—yup, that’s me 👀💅)

Chapter 5 is almost ready I will publish it either on Friday or Saturday if I don't lose control and publish earlier again🤣

✨ And as always… ✨

Got a character on your mind? Even if they’re a little out there—I’m all ears 🤭
I live for turning chaos, angst, fluff, and drama into something unforgettable.

If you’re new and already vibing with the mess and emotions?
Hit that follow 🥹💕 Let’s keep building beautifully messy stories together 💥

P.S. I’m still running that genre/scenario survey to help shape what comes next 💕
You don’t have to follow to vote—but it’d mean the world if you did 🫣🫶

👉 https://forms.office.com/r/1B7NDibusb 👈

Huge thanks to everyone who’s already shared their thoughts—you’re seriously the best 💖
creator: ElianaKarsu123
